title: asplenium ensiforme f. stenophyllum
intro: Asplenium ensiforme f. stenophyllum, also known as the sword fern, is a type of fern that belongs to the Aspleniaceae family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its potential medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, as well as its ability to aid in the treatment of respiratory issues and skin conditions. The health benefits of A. ensiforme f. stenophyllum include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate symptoms of colds and flu, and soothe skin irritations. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures, and can also be applied topically as a poultice or salve.
